name: Armored Plating
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Adapt and Overcome
granted_abilities.text: When this model declares a non-general action, it may choose one friendly attached upgrade to receive a (c) and one suit to that action's Skl. After resolving the action, discard the chosen upgrade.

granted_abilities.name: Armor
granted_abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

extraction_notes: Card shows decorative helmet/armor icon in center
Armor ability has shield icon prefix indicating defensive ability type
